items.name: AutoML-AdvancedML
items.description: Course project for the Machine Learning (Advanced) class at CEU. This repository implements a simple AutoML framework for regression using simulated annealing to select models and tune hyperparameters, with different temperature multipliers for model and hyperparameter changes. The approach is compared with TPOT and auto-sklearn.

items.name: pontos
items.description: 🛠️ Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

items.name: masfi
items.description: Mapping Alternate Scenarios of Forest Intactness (MASFI) is a cloud-based machine learning framework. It uses XGBoost regression and remote sensing data such as GEDI LiDAR to create high-resolution maps and statistics, supporting protected area planning and management.

items.name: tensorflow
items.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

items.description: Developed a Diabetic Prediction System using Machine Learning with Pandas and NumPy for data preprocessing and analysis. Implemented and compared KNN, Decision Tree, and MLP classifiers, improving accuracy through model evaluation and hyperparameter tuning.and Django backend framework

It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: UNIVERSAL-CUSTOMER-CHURN-PREDICTION-SYSTEM
items.description: A Universal Customer Churn Prediction System is an advanced analytics framework designed to identify which customers are likely to stop using a service or product. The "universal" system is built to be industry-agnostic, capable of processing diverse data streams—from banking transactions to telecom usage—using a unified machine learning pipeline.

items.name: Microexon-Regulatory-Modeling-via-SVR-and-SHAP
items.description: High-throughput machine learning pipeline designed to decode the regulatory logic of microexon splicing. The framework uses Support Vector Regression (SVR) to predict microexon inclusion levels (PSI) based on the expression profiles of Splicing Factors (SFs), utilizing SHAP values to identify the primary regulatory drivers.

items.name: visa_prediction-MLOPs_project
items.description: This project implements a production-ready machine learning workflow for visa approval prediction. It covers data ingestion, feature engineering, model training, experiment tracking, and deployment, highlighting best practices in reproducibility, scalability, and automation within an MLOps framework.

items.name: jasmine
items.description: This C++ machine learning framework uses concepts, templates, and expression templates for efficient, modular neural network development. It supports matrix operations, layers (e.g., `weight_net_t`, `sigmoid_net_t`), optimizers (SGD, Adam, Nadam), and initialization methods (Xavier, He). Designed for performance and extensibility.
